commands.description: Pick a saved SSH host and open a terminal connected to it.
commands.title: Open SSH Terminal

description: Manage SSH hosts and open SSH terminals from Pier.

en.name: SSH Hosts
en.description: Manage SSH hosts and open SSH terminals from Pier.

pier.ssh.openTerminal.title: Open SSH Terminal
pier.ssh.openTerminal.description: Pick a saved SSH host and open a terminal connected to it.

messages.pier.ssh.openTerminal.title: Open SSH Terminal
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.title: SSH Hosts
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.emptyDesc: Add a host or import entries from your ssh config to open SSH terminals in one click.
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.removeConfirmBod: The host is removed from Pier only. Nothing changes on the remote machine or in your ssh config.
messages.pier.ssh.form.name: Display name
messages.pier.ssh.form.hostDescription: Hostname, IP address, or an alias from your ssh config.
messages.pier.ssh.form.hostRequired: Enter a hostname, IP address, or ssh config alias.
messages.pier.ssh.import.title: Import SSH hosts
messages.pier.ssh.import.description: Hosts found in ~/.ssh/config. Imported entries connect through your ssh config, so jump hosts and identity files keep working.
messages.pier.ssh.picker.title: Open SSH terminal
messages.pier.ssh.picker.description: Choose a host to connect to.
messages.pier.ssh.picker.noHosts: No SSH hosts yet. Add one in Settings first.

zh-CN.name: SSH 主机
zh-CN.description: 在 Pier 中管理 SSH 主机并打开 SSH 终端。

pier.ssh.openTerminal.title: 打开 SSH 终端
pier.ssh.openTerminal.description: 选择一台已保存的远程主机，并打开连接到它的终端。

messages.pier.ssh.openTerminal.title: 打开 SSH 终端
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.title: SSH 主机
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.emptyDesc: 添加主机或从 ssh 配置导入后，即可一键打开 SSH 终端。
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.removeConfirmBod: 只会从 Pier 中移除该主机，不会改动远程机器或你的 ssh 配置。
messages.pier.ssh.hosts.settings.loadFailed: 无法加载 SSH 主机
messages.pier.ssh.form.name: 显示名称
messages.pier.ssh.form.hostDescription: 主机名、IP 地址，或 ssh 配置中的别名。
messages.pier.ssh.form.hostRequired: 请输入主机名、IP 地址或 ssh 配置别名。
messages.pier.ssh.form.portInvalid: 请输入 1 到 65535 之间的端口。
messages.pier.ssh.import.title: 导入 SSH 主机
messages.pier.ssh.import.description: 以下主机来自 ~/.ssh/config。导入后仍通过你的 ssh 配置连接，跳板机和私钥设置继续生效。
messages.pier.ssh.import.none: 未在 ~/.ssh/config 中发现新的主机。
messages.pier.ssh.picker.title: 打开 SSH 终端
messages.pier.ssh.picker.noHosts: 还没有 SSH 主机。请先在设置中添加。
messages.pier.ssh.terminal.opening: 正在打开 SSH 终端…

name: SSH Hosts
